sourceMovie.title: Hansan: Rising Dragon
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Hansan: Rising Dragon works as a war movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The war and action blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: My Way
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Hansan: Rising Dragon clicked for you, My Way (2011) is a strong next stop: both trade in war and action, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Hansan: Rising Dragon?
faq.answer: Try My Way, The Admiral: Roaring Currents, Midway—each shares DNA with Hansan: Rising Dragon while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Hansan: Rising Dragon?
faq.answer: Hansan: Rising Dragon (2022) is best described as War, Action, Drama, History. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Hansan: Rising Dragon part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Admiral Yi Trilogy" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
